notes.data_protection: Email addresses partially masked per privacy standards. Full unmask available via RocketReach/Hunter subscription.
research_challenges: Executive personal emails increasingly protected by companies
Company phone/email preferred for initial outreach
LinkedIn remains most reliable contact discovery source
Small Italian companies have limited English web presence
recommendations: Prioritize LinkedIn for initial contact attempts
Use company general email + executive office request for first touch
Maintain lead scoring system for follow-up prioritization
Consider B2B data enrichment services for phone/email completion
Plan phone outreach campaign for high-value targets
